column4: Shared constrained planner prompt with strict rules action checklist workflow construction rules self-check output schema examples available skills and user requirement.
column5: 所有 O2 candidate 共用的基础 planner prompt。真正的 family 差异是在这个 base 之上叠加 Planning strategy。
原始基线 prompt，不额外加策略提示。

column4: Use the fewest tools possible while still satisfying the explicit request. Collapse optional intermediate steps unless required.
column5: 优先最少工具数；如果中间步骤不是必须，就尽量收缩。

column4: Minimize the number of transformations. Prefer direct producer-to-consumer paths over multi-hop reformulation.
column5: 优先最少变换次数；减少多跳改写和中间转换。

column4: Enumerate every explicit user-requested action internally and ensure each is covered by at least one tool.
column5: 严格覆盖用户显式要求的每个动作，避免漏步骤。

column4: Decompose the request into sequential sub-goals and map each sub-goal to the most direct executable step.
column5: 先拆子目标，再逐步映射工具，强调顺序化分解。

column4: Preserve every user-requested operation even if a shorter workflow exists.
column5: 即使有更短路径，也保留每一个用户明确要求的操作。

column4: Preserve independent branches when parallel downstream use is implied.
column5: 如果请求天然有并行分支，就保留 DAG 分支结构。

column4: Do not linearize independent operations only because modalities match.
column5: 不要因为 modality 能接上，就把独立分支强行串成链。

column4: Maximize semantic dependency continuity between adjacent steps.
column5: 强调语义依赖连续性，下游节点要接到真正被消费的上游输出。

column4: Copy filenames styles phrases effect names and parameter values exactly from the user request.
column5: 文件名、style、effect、参数值都尽量逐字拷贝。
